title: [firtool] `firrtl.AttributeAnnotation` on arrays is ignored by firtool

features.name: attribute annotation on unpacked array wire
features.description: Code should include a wire declaration with unpacked array type that carries an attribute annotation like (* mark_debug = "yes" *) in SystemVerilog

features.name: attribute annotation on array element wire
features.description: Code should include individual wire declarations representing array elements that carry attribute annotations like (* mark_debug = "yes" *) when the source had annotations on the array-typed wire
features.snippet:
(* mark_debug = "yes" *) wire [7:0] arr_0;
(* mark_debug = "yes" *) wire [7:0] arr_1;
